---
name: postmortem-accounting
description: Structured postmortem and intervention-accounting guidance for BOX.
---

Use this skill when a change affects lessons, recurrence handling, or policy retirement.

Required checklist:
- Link each intervention to a measurable outcome or explicit no-signal result.
- Preserve lineage between lesson, intervention, and retirement decision.
- Distinguish advisory observations from blocking governance signals.
- Prefer deterministic counters and ledgers over prose summaries.
- Keep retirement logic reversible and evidence-based.
